settings.title: BEDGEAR Affiliate Program
settings.text: We love our affiliates and are always looking for new connections. Get in touch with our affiliate program managers!

settings.heading: High-Performance, Proven Products
settings.text: BEDGEAR creates innovative sleep essentials designed to support recovery, comfort, and better daily output.

settings.heading: Attractive Commission Opportunities
settings.text: Affiliates earn competitive commissions with strong returns driven by premium products and high order values.

settings.heading: Exclusive Access and Creative Support
settings.text: Partners gain early launches, exclusive promotions, and marketing assets to fuel authentic content.

settings.heading: Trusted Brand with Industry Recognition
settings.text: BEDGEAR is trusted by athletes, teams, doctors, and creators, and featured in top media worldwide.

settings.title: Why You'll Love It
settings.caption: BEDGEAR delivers proven, performance-driven sleep solutions we trust and use ourselves. It’s a brand that aligns perfectly with recovery, comfort, and better daily performance.

settings.heading: Affiliate Program
settings.description: For individual creators - earn a competitive commission for sales generated through your unique attribution link.

settings.heading: Publisher Program
settings.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur. Dapibus natoque molestie consequat euismod in in. Non quis ac in sed et nec posuere. Adipiscing non id tristique nec gravida nisi consectetur velit leo.

settings.heading: Influencer Program
settings.description: For influencers - earn a competitive commission for sales generated through your unique attribution link.

settings.question: Do affiliates receive free or gifted product?
settings.answer: Product gifting isn’t guaranteed as part of the program, but we may offer gifting opportunities on a case-by-case basis depending on fit, content style, and campaign needs.

settings.question: How are sales and commissions tracked?
settings.answer: After approval, you’ll receive a personalized tracking link that attributes all qualifying purchases to you, with full visibility into clicks, sales, and earnings through our affiliate platform.

settings.question: When and how do affiliates get paid?
settings.answer: Commission payouts are issued on a regular schedule through our affiliate platform once orders are confirmed and return windows have passed.

settings.question: What types of creators does BEDGEAR partner with?
settings.answer: We work with publishers and creators across wellness, fitness, lifestyle, recovery, and home who authentically value sleep and performance.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.content_text: Can't find what you're looking for?
